title: Restriction on pay in lieu of maternity leave
content:
Save as provided in section 15(2), no payment of maternity leave 
pay or other sum may be made in lieu of the grant of maternity 
leave.
(Added 22 of 1981 s. 6)
Last updated date
11.12.2020
Employment Ordinance
Part III	
3-32
Section 15C	
Cap. 57
Verified Copy
Part IIIA
Paternity Leave
(Part IIIA added 21 of 2014 s. 6)
